column1: #   formula   an = formula referencing setup cells.
#   setup     ';'-separated CELL=value pairs; value is a typed literal —
#             bare number (5 | 3.14), text:<s>, bool:TRUE|bool:FALSE, or empty.
#             A '-' setup means no input cells.
#   expected  the General-formatted result, or an error token (#VALUE!, …).
# LEN counts characters (Unicode scalars), not bytes; numbers via General text.
